title: The Rescue Turns Desperate
description: Pages 22–23 focus on the rescue turns desperate, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Flevance Citizens, Unknown person #2, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as corazon risks everything to steal the Ope Ope no Mi for Law, turning the flashback into a desperate rescue mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And you call yourself a doc- Tor?!

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: He has already been to 8 hospital- tails and now the boy with "Amber Lead Sickness" is currently-

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: corazon... isn't there any way to heal this... it hurts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No point complain' about it...the next place will definitely heal you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Will you be healed? Or will you die?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Right now, you are braced over the most cru-cial crux of your life.

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: Lock down the hospital!! He's trying to come in--!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Do you want me to kill each and every one of Ya?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What am I doing...to this boy who was born in that tragic town...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: All I'm doing is making him remember all of that tragedy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: without being able to help him in the slight- EST....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Is this for the sake of "D"...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: No... I don't care about that anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: for this stupid little runt... who's never known anything but pain...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: and although he's prob- ably never been told it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: for such little brat who's still so young...to say "I'm already going to die..."...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: JUST FEEL SO SORRY FOR YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You were the one that was hurting...so all I could do was feel compassion for you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Whatever... just answer the Dender- Mushi already!!

summary: The Rescue Turns Desperate advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Flevance Citizens, Unknown person #2, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #3, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
